title: Code of Conduct and Workplace Behavior Expectations
text:
Q: What are the expectations for my behavior at work?
A: Our Code of Conduct outlines the expected behaviors and ethical standards for all employees. We expect all employees to treat each other with respect, maintain a professional demeanor, and foster a collaborative work environment. Harassment, discrimination, and any form of bullying are strictly prohibited. Employees are encouraged to report any violations to their direct supervisor or the HR department within 24 hours of the incident. Additionally, we promote integrity and accountability; employees should avoid conflicts of interest and ensure that their actions reflect positively on the company. Regular training sessions on workplace behavior will be held quarterly, and employees are required to attend. For any questions or concerns regarding the Code of Conduct, please contact the HR department at hr@company.com.
